title: Multiplication
summary: Multiplication compresses repeated addition and enables scaling.
claim: Multiplication represents repeated addition or the scaling of one quantity by another.
proof: If a equal groups each contain b items, the total may be found by adding b repeatedly a times. Multiplication compresses that repeated addition.
validation: Level 5 — Mathematical / Logical Proof within arithmetic.
reconstruction: Can be rediscovered by arranging objects into equal rows or groups and counting the total.
